# Data Engineering for Machine Learning

Interactive steps, working notes, and AI annotation on the Data Engineering for Machine Learning book.

## Homepage
/

## Repository
https://github.com/joealongi/dataengineeringformachinelearning

## Notes
- This site is an Angular application.
- The entire contents of the book can be found at /llms-full.txt.
- Prefer the repository README for the most complete project documentation.
